$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for color tokens. Base values per FRONTEND_DESIGN_PLAN.md Section 2.1; deviations from that table are logged in design/CHANGELOG.md (B1 resolution). Names are locked API per Section 4.2 — renaming is a breaking change requiring a CHANGELOG entry. Consumed by tailwind.config.ts AND (per plan) Figma via Tokens Studio. Every pairing is contrast-verified by scripts/contrast-check.mjs before merge.

contrastContract.$comment: Enforced pairings (gate fails below these). min 4.5 = text (incl. link + tag-label text); min 3.0 = non-text UI indicator (focus ring) per WCAG 1.4.11. B1: color-accent (marigold) is NOT graded here — see decorativeExempt; it is a logotype/decorative mark only. Text/link/active-state uses point at color-link, never color-accent.

decorativeExempt.$comment: color-accent (marigold) is a BRAND/LOGOTYPE + decorative mark only (logo lockup, marigold motif in favicon/loading/empty states, decorative fills/rules) — never running text, never a meaningful UI control. WCAG 2.1 1.4.3 exempts logotypes and 1.4.11 exempts purely decorative elements, so it is INTENTIONALLY not graded as text (it measures 2.33:1 light on white). Any link, body-text, or active-state use MUST resolve to color-link (or color-text), not color-accent.
